draft:
Dear Marcy,

Thank you for reaching out. We apologize for the delay in responding and understand your frustration. We are currently reviewing your request and will get back to you as soon as possible with an update on your paperwork.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The client's email indicates a high urgency and a document request. Since there are no specific figures to verify and the firm has no recorded amount, the draft acknowledges the request and promises a follow-up without committing to any specific details or timelines.
